codeScreen.subtitle: One click. No account or key needed.
codeScreen.privacyNotice: Your conversation is never stored. <privacyLink>Privacy Notice</privacyLink>
codeScreen.wakingUp: Waking Bede up… the first visit in a while can take up to a minute. Thanks for your patience.

chatScreen.drawingReady: Drawing ready. Add a note, or just send it.
chatScreen.uploadNarration: Upload narration from your notebook (e.g. inq)
chatScreen.placeholderHoldListening: Listening… let go when you're done
chatScreen.placeholderYourTurn: Your turn — press and hold the mic to talk
chatScreen.placeholderTypeOrMic: Type or tap the mic to speak…
chatScreen.micHoldListening: Listening… let go when you're done
chatScreen.micPermissionDenied: I can't hear you — this browser has blocked the microphone. You can still type your answer, or check the browser's microphone permission for this site.
chatScreen.micUnavailable: I can't hear you right now — something's wrong with the microphone. You can still type your answer instead.

header.masteryPreviewTooltip: Preview live mastery tracking for this session
header.feedbackTooltip: Tell us what's working and what isn't
header.finishDemoTooltip: Finish the demo and optionally get Bede's notes by email

sessionPaused.finishedLearningTime: {{name}}, you have finished your learning time for today.
sessionPaused.useFinishAbove: Use Finish above to wrap up.
sessionPaused.stepAway: Step away from the screen. Be with nature, rest your eyes, or spend a quiet moment with God.

sessionEnded.title: Your session has ended
sessionEnded.body: Generate a new code to keep exploring Bede.

summary.sentTo: Sent to {{email}}. This address wasn't saved anywhere.
summary.wantNotes: Want Bede's notes from today's demo?
summary.notesDisclaimer: An informal impression from this one short session, not an official evaluation. Sent once to the address below. Never stored, and never shown to {{name}}.
summary.sessionEndedCantSend: Your session has ended, so this could not be sent.
summary.helpUsImprove: Help us improve — a few quick questions
summary.teachingRatingLabel: How did Bede's Socratic teaching style feel?
summary.easeRatingLabel: How easy was the demo to use?
summary.recommendRatingLabel: How likely are you to recommend Bede to another homeschool family?
summary.improvementPlaceholder: What worked, what didn't, what you wish it did...
summary.parentGuardianCheckbox: I'm this learner's parent or guardian, and you may follow up with me by email
summary.neverAskChild: — we never ask a child for their own email
summary.couldNotSendFeedback: Could not send this right now — please try again later.
summary.thanksHelps: Thanks — this genuinely helps shape what's next.

parentControls.heading: Parent Controls
parentControls.sessionLengthDesc: The session ends when this time is up. Learners rest for ten minutes after every hour.
parentControls.lockedDesc: The learner cannot change the theme or bubble color.
parentControls.unlockedDesc: The learner may change the theme and bubble color.
parentControls.passwordNote: In the full app, the parent password protects these settings.

breakActivities: Look at something at least 20 feet away for 20 seconds — it gives your eyes a real rest.
Step outside if you can. Find one living thing, like a bird or a leaf, and really look at it for a minute.
Take a quiet moment to thank God for one thing you learned or noticed today.
Do 15 jumping jacks or stretch your arms up over your head.
Look out a window at the sky. What are the clouds doing right now? Which way is the wind blowing?
Mental math: what is 17 + 26? Try it without writing it down.
Pray a slow Our Father, paying attention to one phrase you usually rush past.
Name five animals whose names start with the letter B.
Find something outside worth drawing later. Remember it for your nature notebook.
Walk to another room and back before you sit down again.
Close your eyes gently and roll your shoulders back ten times.
Sit still for one quiet minute. God speaks in the silence. Just listen.
Mental math: what is 9 x 7? Say the answer out loud.
Think of a word that rhymes with "light" — how many can you find?
Step outside or to a window and take five slow, deep breaths.
Mental math: if you have 3 dozen eggs, how many eggs is that?

common.networkError: Could not reach the server. It may be waking up after being idle. Wait a few seconds and try again.

consent.betaNotice: This is a public beta — please read this first.
consent.bullet1: Your conversation is never stored. Nothing you or your learner says is saved, ever.
consent.bullet2: Anonymized patterns may be reviewed — which teaching techniques were used, never what was said — to help us improve Bede.
consent.bullet3: Name and grade personalize this session — kept up to 6 hours (sooner if you log out), then deleted automatically. Never part of any permanent record.
consent.bullet4: Feedback is optional. Parents/guardians may leave an email for follow-up — we never ask a child for their own.
consent.readPrivacyNotice: Read the full Privacy Notice, including our COPPA parental notice
consent.agree: I understand and agree — let's begin
